title: Chore: Optimize build time
original_text: Optimized build time by implementing caching. Added build cache for dependencies. Implemented incremental builds. Added parallel build execution. Optimized webpack configuration. Added build time monitoring. Reduced build time from 5 minutes to 2 minutes. Result: build time reduced by 60%.
expected_subject: chore(build): optimize build time with caching
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(build): optimize build time with caching"
